scripts.makepot: cd .. && php -d memory_limit=-1 $(command -v wp) i18n make-pot . plugin/languages/structura-php.pot --domain=structura --slug=structura --include=plugin/includes,plugin/structura.php --exclude=_old-wp,wordpress,node_modules,.next,vendor,build,dist,.claude,.git && node scripts/extract-client-pot.mjs plugin/languages/structura-client.pot && msgcat --use-first plugin/languages/structura-php.pot plugin/languages/structura-client.pot -o plugin/languages/structura.pot && rm plugin/languages/structura-php.pot plugin/languages/structura-client.pot && node scripts/po-to-wp-json.mjs
